series_metadata.series_description: All informal and/or temporary messages and notes including telephone voice mail messages, instant messages, text messages, post-it-notes, general/generic emails, correspondence, junk mail and emails, shared departmental calendars, drafts, and other time-limited documents which serve to convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communication. All records will be reviewed to ensure that any confidential information is redacted prior to recycling.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
